repetition_remaining: fallback synthesis still repeats strongest / weakest / data quality
score hero and prose sections remain visually close enough to bleed together

sources_of_repetition.issue: legacy_summary, summary, and synthesis_prose are populated from the same narrative source
deterministic fallback synthesis still emits strongest / weakest / data quality wording
current reading and synthesis are rendered as two separate narrative blocks

proposed_changes.name: current_reading_becomes_metadata_first
proposed_changes.impact: reduces duplicate prose and lowers score_led pressure
proposed_changes.description: Keep the tab, but compress it into a compact diagnostic summary focused on readiness, data quality, and evidence coverage.

proposed_changes.name: single_narrative_lead
proposed_changes.impact: improves hierarchy and removes duplicated editorial authority
proposed_changes.description: Render only one full-length narrative lead and convert the other block into a short contextual lead or pointer.

proposed_changes.name: fallback_synthesis_reframed
proposed_changes.impact: reduces score-shaped prose in visible narrative sections
proposed_changes.description: Keep deterministic fallback behavior, but move strongest / weakest / data quality wording out of the main narrative position.

proposed_changes.name: hero_and_prose_separation
proposed_changes.impact: makes the score hero read like metadata, not the narrative lead
proposed_changes.description: Visually separate score metadata from the narrative blocks so the page hierarchy is less score-first.

expected_voice_impact: clearer separation between metadata and interpretation
rollback_plan: restore the prior current reading and synthesis split
restore the prior fallback synthesis wording
keep the prompt refinements in place
compare snapshots before trying further hierarchy changes
staged_order: compress current reading into metadata-first summary
reduce duplication between current reading and synthesis
reframe fallback synthesis away from score-shaped prose
rebalance the score hero versus the narrative blocks
